tools.name: Compress PDF
tools.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality. Supports up to 200MB files.
tools.how_to_use: Upload your PDF file → Choose compression level (Low/Medium/High) → Click Compress → Download compressed file

tools.name: Merge PDF
tools.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one single PDF document.
tools.how_to_use: Upload multiple PDF files → Drag to reorder if needed → Click Merge PDF → Download merged file

tools.name: Split PDF
tools.description: Split a PDF into multiple separate files by page range or extract specific pages.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Choose split mode (by range / extract pages / every N pages) → Click Split → Download files

tools.name: Rotate PDF
tools.description: Rotate PDF pages 90°, 180°, or 270°. Rotate all pages or select specific pages.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Select pages to rotate → Choose rotation angle → Click Rotate → Download

tools.name: Organize PDF
tools.description: Reorder, delete, or rearrange pages in a PDF document visually.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Drag pages to reorder → Delete unwanted pages → Click Organize → Download

tools.name: Protect PDF
tools.description: Add password protection to your PDF file to prevent unauthorized access.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Set a password → Click Protect → Download password-protected PDF

tools.name: Unlock PDF
tools.description: Remove password protection from PDF if you know the password.
tools.how_to_use: Upload locked PDF → Enter password → Click Unlock → Download unlocked PDF

tools.name: Watermark PDF
tools.description: Add text or image watermark to your PDF pages.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Enter watermark text or upload image → Adjust position, opacity, size → Click Apply → Download

tools.name: Repair PDF
tools.description: Fix corrupted or damaged PDF files and recover content.
tools.how_to_use: Upload damaged PDF → Click Repair → Download fixed PDF

tools.name: OCR PDF
tools.description: Convert scanned PDFs or images into searchable and editable text using OCR technology.
tools.how_to_use: Upload scanned PDF or image → Select language → Click OCR → Download searchable PDF

tools.name: AI Summarizer
tools.description: Summarize long PDF documents using AI. Get key points and highlights automatically.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → AI analyzes content → View summary with key points → Download or copy

tools.name: Translate PDF
tools.description: Translate PDF documents to different languages using AI while preserving layout.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Select target language → Click Translate → Download translated PDF

tools.name: Sign PDF
tools.description: Add digital signature to PDF documents. Draw, type, or upload your signature.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Add signature (draw/type/upload) → Position on page → Click Apply → Download signed PDF

tools.name: PDF to Word
tools.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents (.docx) while preserving formatting.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Click Convert → Download .docx Word file

tools.name: Word to PDF
tools.description: Convert Word documents (.doc, .docx) to PDF format.
tools.how_to_use: Upload Word file → Click Convert → Download PDF

tools.name: PDF to JPG
tools.description: Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG images.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Choose image quality → Click Convert → Download JPG images (zip if multiple)

tools.name: JPG to PDF
tools.description: Convert JPG, PNG, or other image files to PDF format.
tools.how_to_use: Upload image(s) → Arrange order → Click Convert → Download PDF

tools.name: Excel to PDF
tools.description: Convert Excel spreadsheets (.xls, .xlsx) to PDF format.
tools.how_to_use: Upload Excel file → Click Convert → Download PDF

tools.name: PDF to Excel
tools.description: Convert PDF tables and data to Excel spreadsheets.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Click Convert → Download Excel file

tools.name: PDF to PowerPoint
tools.description: Convert PDF slides to editable PowerPoint presentations (.pptx).
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Click Convert → Download PowerPoint file

tools.name: HTML to PDF
tools.description: Convert HTML files or web pages to PDF format.
tools.how_to_use: Upload HTML file → Click Convert → Download PDF

tools.name: PDF to Text
tools.description: Extract all text content from PDF files as plain text (.txt).
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Click Extract → Download .txt file

tools.name: Edit PDF
tools.description: Add text, images, shapes, and annotations to PDF files in your browser.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Use editing tools to add text/images/shapes → Save → Download edited PDF

tools.name: Redact PDF
tools.description: Permanently hide or black out sensitive information in PDF documents.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Select text or area to redact → Click Apply → Download redacted PDF

tools.name: PDF Metadata
tools.description: View and edit PDF metadata including title, author, subject, and keywords.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → View/edit metadata fields → Click Save → Download updated PDF

tools.name: Compare PDF
tools.description: Compare two PDF documents and highlight differences between them.
tools.how_to_use: Upload two PDF files → Click Compare → View highlighted differences

tools.name: Image to PDF
tools.description: Convert any image format (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, GIF) to PDF.
tools.how_to_use: Upload images → Arrange order → Click Convert → Download PDF

tools.name: Background Remover
tools.description: Remove background from images automatically using AI. Get transparent PNG.
tools.how_to_use: Upload image → AI removes background → Download PNG with transparent background

tools.name: Image Compressor
tools.description: Compress JPG, PNG, WebP images to reduce file size without losing quality.
tools.how_to_use: Upload image → Choose quality level → Click Compress → Download compressed image

tools.name: Crop Image
tools.description: Crop images to any size or aspect ratio directly in your browser.
tools.how_to_use: Upload image → Drag crop area → Choose size or ratio → Click Crop → Download

tools.name: Resize Image
tools.description: Resize images to exact dimensions (width × height) in pixels.
tools.how_to_use: Upload image → Enter new width/height → Click Resize → Download

tools.name: Image Filters
tools.description: Apply filters and effects to images: brightness, contrast, saturation, blur, etc.
tools.how_to_use: Upload image → Adjust filter sliders → Click Apply → Download

tools.name: Numbers to Words
tools.description: Convert numbers to words in multiple languages including English, Hindi, Urdu.
tools.how_to_use: Enter number → Select language → Click Convert → Copy result

tools.name: Currency Converter
tools.description: Convert between 160+ currencies with live exchange rates.
tools.how_to_use: Enter amount → Select from/to currency → View converted amount (auto-updates)

tools.name: Crop PDF
tools.description: Crop PDF pages to remove margins or select specific areas.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Set crop margins → Click Crop → Download

tools.name: Add Page Numbers
tools.description: Add page numbers to PDF with custom position, font, and style.
tools.how_to_use: Upload PDF → Choose position (header/footer/corner) → Customize style → Click Apply → Download

faq.question: Are all tools free?
faq.answer: Yes! All 36 tools on ILovePDF are completely free to use. No signup required for basic features.

faq.question: What is the file size limit?
faq.answer: Compress PDF supports files up to 200MB. All other tools support files up to 50MB. Files are automatically deleted after processing.

faq.question: Are my files safe?
faq.answer: Yes! Your files are processed securely and deleted automatically within seconds after download. We do not store or share your files.

faq.question: Do I need to install anything?
faq.answer: No installation needed! Everything works directly in your browser. No software to install.

faq.question: How many tools does ILovePDF have?
faq.answer: ILovePDF has 36 tools covering PDF editing, conversion, image processing, and utility tools.

faq.question: What file formats are supported?
faq.answer: PDF, Word (doc/docx), Excel (xls/xlsx), PowerPoint (ppt/pptx), HTML, JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, GIF and more.
